# Buildwise Media — Full Details

> AI-native marketing agency delivering automated marketing engines for service businesses.

## Company
- Name: Buildwise Media LLC
- Type: AI-native marketing agency
- Founded: Alpharetta, Georgia
- Tagline: Build Today. Secure Tomorrow. Live Fully.

## What We Do
We build automated, AI-powered marketing engines for service business owners. While other agencies start with ads and hope, we build the conversion system first. Every component is engineered against documented standards and verified before it ships.

## How It Works
1. **Learn** — We research your business, market, and customers. Market analysis, competitor mapping, audience research, breakthrough offer development.
2. **Build** — AI builds your marketing engine: website, content, ads, follow-up sequences. Websites score 90+ on Lighthouse. Content meets Flesch-Kincaid readability standards.
3. **Automate** — Your engine runs on autopilot. Leads come in. Follow-ups go out. Appointments book. Monthly reporting shows what's working.

## Timeline
30 days from kickoff to a live marketing engine.

## Services

### Ascend (Full Marketing Engine)
The complete marketing engine for service businesses:
- Deep market research and competitor analysis
- Breakthrough offer development
- Custom conversion-optimized website
- SEO-driven content system
- Paid ad management (Meta and Google)
- Automated email and SMS follow-up sequences
- Monthly reporting and optimization
- Month-to-month, no contracts

### Ascend Lite (Starter Engine)
The foundation for service business marketing:
- Conversion-optimized website
- Online booking integration (Cal.com)
- Local SEO setup and schema markup
- AI-ready content structure (llms.txt, JSON-LD)
- Mobile-first, fast-loading design
- You own the code and content
- Upgrade path to full Ascend

## Key Differentiators
- AI-native from day one (not bolted on)
- 85% of marketing processes automated
- Month-to-month, no contracts
- You own everything we build
- 30-day timeline (not 90+)
- System-first approach (build conversion system before running traffic)

## Guarantee
The Build-Right Guarantee: Month-to-month. No contracts. No lock-in. You own your website, your content, and your data.

## Results
- $10M+ revenue generated for partners
- 85% marketing automated
- 9 active partners
